case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR VS. MANUEL L. FERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES, FOR WMALT SERIES 2007-OA3 AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MANUEL L. FERNANDEZ, REYNA DOES 1 TO 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MANUEL L. FERNANDEZ, REYNA DOES 1 TO 20, INCL.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES, FOR WMALT SERIES 2007-OA3 SERVED NOV-05-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCL.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MANUEL L. FERNANDEZ, REYNA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND BY MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES, FOR WMALT SERIES 2007-OA3 SERVED NOV-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, REYNA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND BY MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES, FOR WMALT SERIES 2007-OA3 SERVED NOV-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MANUEL L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATES, FOR WMALT SERIES 2007-OA3 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, MANUEL L. FERNANDEZ, REYNA DOES 1 TO 20, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 CONCORG STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
